scene: A doodle stick figure squeezing its eyes shut, straining hard to remember, while birthday candles fade into blank white behind it. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
A long vertical film strip of a doodle stick figure's life, but the very first frames are torn out into empty glowing white holes. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
A glowing wide-eyed doodle baby in the dark, swirling colors, shapes and sounds pouring into it, fully alive and absorbing everything. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
A bright glowing doodle baby being wiped away by a giant eraser, leaving a blank white void where it was. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

An adult doodle stick figure alone in a dramatic spotlight, staring at an open photo album whose earliest pages are blank glowing white holes, a big red question mark above its head. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
